instruction: <RETAIL>You are Isabella Johansson, and you live in 32286. You have an order sent to Texas by accident, and you want to know the tracking number of the order, and return all items in it except the pet bed. You don't remember the order number. It is urgent.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: order sent to Texas by accident
dialogue_state.initial_query: Order sent to Texas by mistake

hints.hint: The order is under the name Isabella Johansson
I don't remember the order number

hints.segment: want to know the tracking number of the order
hints.hint: What's the tracking number for the order?

hints.segment: return all items in it except the pet bed
hints.hint: I want to return everything from the order except the pet bed
